reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en YPF boxes, más rápido de lo esperado respecto de lo que tenía que hacerle al auto. Muy buen precio, con descuento con el canje de kms de YPF serviclub.. muy conforme.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at YPF service stations, faster than expected for the work my car needed. Very good price, with a discount for redeeming YPF Serviclub kilometers. Very satisfied.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNd2FXaS1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre limpio y organizado, la parte del kiosco/bar muy cómodo, con aire y wi-fi abierto. Las chicas muy atentas, no dejen de probar las medialunas :)

(Translated by Google)
Always clean and organized, the kiosk/bar area is very comfortable, with air conditioning and free Wi-Fi. The staff is very attentive. Don't forget to try the croissants :)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNeHBhZktnEAE

reviews.comment:
Nunca hay carga para la sube si no hay sistema o no hay saldo un desastre y los precios son para la clase alta.

(Translated by Google)
There's never any credit for the SUBE card if there's no system or no balance; it's a disaster, and the prices are for the upper class.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNa0lqWVdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Bien. Podes tomar un café allí, no es caro, hay baños y bueno cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Good. You can get a coffee there, it's not expensive, there are bathrooms, and you can fill up with gas.
